messages.subject: TTI — The Fluidstack of AI Automation for SMBs — Seed Round
messages.content:
Hi,

You just backed Fluidstack at $18B for solving AI infrastructure bottlenecks at scale.

We are solving the same bottleneck — but for the 33 million small businesses in America that cannot afford enterprise AI.

Total Transformation Inc. (TTI) deploys AI voice agents and appointment setters that respond to every lead in under 60 seconds, 24/7, no human required. White-labeled under the client's brand. $2,500 setup + $997/mo.

SaaStr deployed this exact system and closed $1M+ in 30 days. 71% of their closed deals touched the AI agent.

We are raising a seed round. The market is 33 million SMBs. The infrastructure is built. The machine is running.

I am not asking for a meeting. I am asking for 15 minutes.

Aaron T. Reddix
CEO — Total Transformation Inc.
(747) 301-8586 | ceomrreddix@gmail.com
https://aaronreddix1987-sketch.github.io

messages.subject: SBIR Phase I Application — Total Transformation Inc. — AI Voice Agent for Veteran Housing Management
messages.content:
Hello,

I am Aaron T. Reddix, CEO of Total Transformation Inc. (TTI), submitting a SBIR Phase I application following President Trump's signing of the SBIR/STTR Reauthorization Act.

COMPANY: Total Transformation Inc.
EIN: 32-0663781
Address: 877 E 43rd Pl, Los Angeles CA 90011
Phone: (747) 301-8586
Email: ceomrreddix@gmail.com

R&D PROJECT: AI Voice Agent for Veteran Housing Management

PROBLEM: 40,000+ veterans are homeless in Los Angeles. Housing providers cannot manage intake, placement, and follow-up at scale with human staff alone.

SOLUTION: TTI is developing an AI voice agent specifically designed for veteran housing management — automating intake interviews, housing placement matching, follow-up scheduling, and SSVF/HUD-VASH compliance reporting.

PHASE I REQUEST: $200,000 for 12-month R&D to build and validate the veteran housing AI management system.

IMPACT: 100+ veterans housed in Los Angeles within 24 months of Phase I completion.

Please advise on the formal application portal and timeline.

Aaron T. Reddix
CEO — Total Transformation Inc.
(747) 301-8586 | ceomrreddix@gmail.com

messages.subject: NSF AI-Ready America Initiative — TTI Application — South Central LA AI Workforce Development
messages.content:
Hello,

I am Aaron T. Reddix, CEO of Total Transformation Inc. (TTI), applying for the NSF AI-Ready America Initiative funding opportunity.

COMPANY: Total Transformation Inc.
EIN: 32-0663781
Location: 877 E 43rd Pl, Los Angeles CA 90011 (South Central LA)

PROGRAM OVERVIEW:
TTI is building the AI Workforce Development Academy for South Central Los Angeles — one of the most underserved communities in America.

OUR THREE PILLARS (aligned with NSF AI-Ready America priorities):
1. AI LITERACY: Free AI automation workshops for 500+ South Central LA residents per year
2. APPLIED SKILLS: Hands-on training in AI tools, prompt engineering, and automation deployment — leading to $60K-$120K remote tech jobs
3. SMALL BUSINESS AI ADOPTION: Deploying AI automation in 100+ Black-owned and minority-owned businesses in Los Angeles

FUNDING REQUEST: $150,000 for Year 1 program launch

IMPACT METRICS:
- 500 residents trained in AI skills
- 50 residents placed in $60K+ remote tech jobs
- 100 small businesses with AI automation deployed
- $5M+ in economic value created in South Central LA

Please advise on the formal application process.

Aaron T. Reddix
CEO — Total Transformation Inc.

messages.subject: Amex ACE Integration — TTI AI Appointment Setter as Agentic Commerce Partner
messages.content:
Hello,

Congratulations on the launch of ACE (Agentic Commerce Experiences) — this is exactly the infrastructure the market needs.

Total Transformation Inc. (TTI) has built an AI appointment setter that books service appointments for businesses across 18 verticals. Our AI responds to every inquiry in under 60 seconds and books directly into provider calendars.

This creates a new distribution channel for TTI and a compelling use case for ACE.

Who is the right person to speak with about ACE integration partnerships?

Aaron T. Reddix
